/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/rux.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Manifest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Package.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Token.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/SourceLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Sema.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Hir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Lir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Asm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Rcu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rux.dir/Source/Linker.cpp.o -o rux
